items.name: The Lulu Mini Duffel Bag In White
items.description:
Add a touch of chic to your avatar’s look with the adorable Crossbody Lulu Bag featuring cute, stylish bows! This trendy accessory is perfect for any outfit, combining elegance and charm with its sleek design and playful bow details. Whether you're dressing up for a virtual event or just want to elevate your everyday style, this bag is a must-have. Grab yours today and carry your virtual essentials in style!

items.name: Olive OV-2A Helmet
items.description:
Since the Mk-22s addition to the BDO arsenal, development of affordable power armor have been in production oversight by the company's Overseer. Adopted after the final trials, this armor has a built in miniature reactor core capable of long lasting power while operating. The suit itself is vacuum sealed to offer protection while operating in space, but also protects against dangerous gasses.
